violations.description: Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Hot dogs on roller temping at 120 degrees F. Roller settings at "warm" holding temperature. Use "cook" setting until proper temperatures are reached.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Boxes and equipment stored on 2 compartment sink in BOH.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Faucet feeding bait tank not provided with back flow prevention.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. FOH and BOH hand sinks have items stored in them. To encourage proper hand washing, ensure hand sinks are clear/clean of items.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Tighten self closing door hinges to ladies restroom. Door doesn't close properly.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. QUAT based sanitizer spray bottle tested for chlorine. Ensure chemical bottles are labeled as to actual contents.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
